chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-426 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.08.2021. Mr. Rizwan Ahmed Memon, Advocate along-with the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ali Jokhio, Advocate for the respondent No.1. Mr. Fayyaz Hussain Sabki, A.P.G for State along-with SIP Rasheed Ahmed Memon SHO P.S Punhal Khan Chandio District Shaheed Benazirabad. == Report furnished by S.H.O P.S. Punhal Khan Chandio is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the applicant. Alleged detenue Mst. Muneeza is produced by S.H.O P.S. Punhal Khan Chandio. It is stated by her that she is under no wrongful confinement of anyone but is living with her parents happily and she does not want to join applicant Ayaz Ali, who is involved in her abduction case. Her statement to that effect has been recorded by S.H.O, P.S. Punhal Khan Chandio, it is taken on record. The circumstances prima facie suggests that no case of wrongful confinement/detention of Mst. Muneeza is apparent, which may justify this Court to make interference with it by way of instant criminal miscellaneous application under section 491 r/w section 561 Cr.P.C; it is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno,
